levels.body: ‘Cunning' in this line can mean "knowledge" (*OED* 1), "wisdom" (2), "skill" (3) or "insight" (Duncan-Jones 158n13).
worksCited: "cunning, n1.". *OED Online*, Oxford University Press, December 2018, www.oed.com/view/Entry/45864. Accessed January 2019.
Duncan-Jones, Katherine (ed.). *Shakespeare's Sonnets*. The Arden Shakespeare, Third Series (Rev. Ed.), Bloomsbury, 2010.

levels.body: Eyes in general, or the eyes of the speaker in particular, still need or lack a specific skill or knowledge that is decisive for perfecting their art.
